primary_angle.title: 40.35mm exact. 5 colourways, one fit.
primary_angle.core_message: The Cradle Adapter V1 is engineered to the exact 40.35mm Royal Pop case diameter, with a 0.7mm retaining lip and 22mm lug width. Five premium FKM rubber colourways ensure a perfect match for every style—no compromises on fit or finish.
primary_angle.why_this_wins: Leverages audience obsession with exact specs (40.35mm, 22mm) while addressing the tension around fit and material quality. The colourway variation reinforces premium positioning and exclusivity, aligning with the 'Product variations' calendar focus.
primary_angle.audience: Royal Pop owners and prospective buyers who prioritize precision engineering and design-led accessories.
primary_angle.desired_reaction: Audience should feel: 'This is the definitive solution—engineered for the Royal Pop, not a generic strap.' They should understand the exact fit and material benefits, and be compelled to join the waitlist to secure their preferred colourway.

supporting_angle.title: Project WristPop: The definitive conversion kit.
supporting_angle.purpose: Reinforces cultural momentum around 'Project WristPop' and positions the Cradle Adapter V1 as the standardized, premium solution. Addresses the audience tension around uncertainty in wrist conversion methods while aligning with Scout's recommendation to own the narrative.

content_decision.goal: Showcase the engineering precision and colourway variations of the Cradle Adapter V1, transforming the Royal Pop into a wristwatch.
content_decision.hook_direction: Precision specs + visual transformation. Open with a tight shot of the 40.35mm case snapping into the adapter, followed by a quick montage of all five colourways on-wrist.
content_decision.conversion_role: Drive waitlist sign-ups by emphasizing exclusivity (limited colourways) and engineering trust (exact fit).

creative_direction.tone: Premium, direct, and slightly obsessive about fit and finish. Avoid hype; focus on calm confidence in engineering.
creative_direction.pace: Fast cuts (1-2s per shot) to highlight precision and variation. Slow down only for key specs (e.g., 40.35mm, 0.7mm lip) to emphasize detail.
creative_direction.visual_energy: High-energy but controlled. Use close-ups of the adapter snapping into place, macro shots of the FKM rubber texture, and smooth transitions between colourways.
must_show: Royal Pop transforming from pocket to wrist (before/after)
must_not_do: Use competitor names or direct comparisons.
Show generic straps or non-Royal Pop watches.
Overpromise on availability or delivery timelines.
Use vague language (e.g., 'perfect fit' without specs).
Include hypebro language or fake luxury clichés.

success_metric.secondary: Engagement rate (likes, shares, saves) on Reel, with a focus on saves as a signal of intent.

brief_for_copy.script_goal: Compress the primary angle into a 15-30s Reel script. Lead with the hook: '40.35mm exact. 5 colourways, one fit.' Highlight the engineering specs (40.35mm, 0.7mm lip, 22mm lug) and material (FKM rubber) in the first 10 seconds. Showcase all five colourways in a quick montage, ending with the transformation shot (pocket to wrist). Close with the CTA: 'Pre-Order Now — limited colourways available.'
brief_for_copy.caption_goal: Reinforce the engineering precision and exclusivity. Include exact specs, material benefits, and a clear CTA to join the waitlist. Example: 'The Cradle Adapter V1: engineered for the 40.35mm Royal Pop case, with a 0.7mm retaining lip and 22mm lug width. Five premium FKM rubber colourways—no compromises. Pre-Order Now to secure yours. #ProjectWristPop'
brief_for_copy.cta_language: Pre-Order Now (exact wording from website truth).
proof_points_to_include: Five colourways (Monochrome, Arctic Blue, Cobalt Orange, Green Eight, Otto Rosso)

website_truth.verified_disclaimer: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.
